name: External SMTP Client
description: Connect to any SMTP server to send transactional emails. Supports Gmail, Outlook, SendGrid, Mailgun, Amazon SES, and other standard SMTP servers.
author: Spwig

host.label: SMTP Server Host
host.help_text: Hostname or IP address of the SMTP server (e.g., smtp.gmail.com)

port.label: SMTP Port
port.help_text: Port number (usually 587 for TLS, 465 for SSL, 25 for unencrypted)

username.label: Username
username.help_text: SMTP authentication username (usually your email address)

password.label: Password
password.help_text: SMTP authentication password or app-specific password

use_tls.label: Use TLS (STARTTLS)
use_tls.help_text: Enable TLS encryption via STARTTLS command (recommended for port 587)

use_ssl.label: Use SSL
use_ssl.help_text: Use implicit SSL/TLS connection (recommended for port 465)

dns_requirements.dkim_note: DKIM signing should be configured on your SMTP server

common_configurations.name: Gmail
common_configurations.note: Requires app-specific password. Enable 2FA first: https://myaccount.google.com/security

common_configurations.name: Outlook / Office 365
common_configurations.note: Use your Office 365 email and password

common_configurations.name: SendGrid SMTP Relay
common_configurations.note: Username: 'apikey', Password: Your SendGrid API key

common_configurations.name: Mailgun SMTP
common_configurations.note: Find SMTP credentials in Mailgun dashboard

common_configurations.name: Amazon SES
common_configurations.note: Use SMTP credentials from SES console (not IAM credentials)

changes: Added provider_dns_profiles for automatic DKIM selector and SPF include detection
DNS validation now correctly validates DKIM and SPF for Gmail, Office 365, Outlook.com, SendGrid, Mailgun, and Amazon SES
Wizard auto-detects the SMTP sub-provider from configured host and applies correct DNS checks
Fixed SendResult format to match base class contract (accepted/status/provider_message_id)
Fixed EmailMessage field names in MIME builder (html/text instead of html_body/text_body)
Fixed attachment and inline image content field name (content instead of data)
Fixed validate_credentials signature to match base class (credentials dict arg, raises ValueError)
Fixed healthcheck return format (success bool + details dict)
Added credential validation in __init__ for fail-fast behavior
Fixed credential_schema format to use flat field definitions matching platform convention
Credential fields (host, port, username, password, TLS, SSL, timeout) now render correctly in setup wizard Step 2
Converted setup_instructions.html and dns_requirements.html to scoped HTML fragments
Eliminated standalone HTML documents with DOCTYPE and global CSS that caused style bleeding
All CSS now scoped under .setup-instructions via provider-wizard.css
Added i18n support with Django {% trans %} template tags
Replaced inline scripts with data-action attributes for CSP compliance
Tab switching uses si-tab/si-tab-content pattern to avoid class conflicts
Copy-to-clipboard buttons use data-action='copy-to-clipboard' pattern
Removed obsolete standalone CSS files (css/ directory)
Initial release
Support for TLS and SSL connections
HTML and text email support
Attachment and inline image support
Connection health checking
Common provider presets (Gmail, Outlook, SendGrid, Mailgun, SES)
